languages.text: "Верно подмечено". {n}Себериан поворачивается к бойцам.{/n} "Воины Заркова! Я, Себериан фон Валанциус, призываю вас следовать за мной! Исполните долг и сокрушите всех врагов на своем пути! За династию фон Валанциус!"

"Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: "Верно подмечено". {n}Себериан поворачивается к бойцам.{/n} "Воины Заркова! Я, Себериан фон Валанциус, призываю вас следовать за мной! Исполните долг и сокрушите всех врагов на своем пути! За династию фон Валанциус!"

traits.locale_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Warriors of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, bid you follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"
"Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Warriors of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, bid you follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

"Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

"Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

languages.text: "Ein guter Punkt." {n}Seberian wendet sich zu den Soldaten um.{/n} "Soldaten von Zarkov! Ich, Seberian von Valancius, fordere Euch auf, mir zu folgen! Tut Eure Pflicht und zerschmettert jeden Fein auf Eurem Weg! Für Haus von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Ein guter Punkt." {n}Seberian wendet sich zu den Soldaten um.{/n} "Soldaten von Zarkov! Ich, Seberian von Valancius, fordere Euch auf, mir zu folgen! Tut Eure Pflicht und zerschmettert jeden Fein auf Eurem Weg! Für Haus von Valancius!"

languages.text: « Vous avez raison. {n}Seberian se tourne vers les soldats.{/n} Soldats de Zarkov ! Moi, Seberian von Valancius, je vous demande de m'accompagner ! Faites votre devoir et écrasez tous ceux qui s'opposeront à vous ! Pour la maison von Valancius ! »
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison. {n}Seberian se tourne vers les soldats.{/n} Soldats de Zarkov ! Moi, Seberian von Valancius, je vous demande de m'accompagner ! Faites votre devoir et écrasez tous ceux qui s'opposeront à vous ! Pour la maison von Valancius ! »

languages.text: «Tiene razón». {n}Seberian se gira hacia los soldados.{/n} «¡Soldados de Zarkov! ¡Yo, Seberian von Valancius, les llamo a seguirme! ¡Cumplan con su deber y aplasten a todo enemigo que encuentren en su camino! ¡Por la casa von Valancius!».
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón». {n}Seberian se gira hacia los soldados.{/n} «¡Soldados de Zarkov! ¡Yo, Seberian von Valancius, les llamo a seguirme! ¡Cumplan con su deber y aplasten a todo enemigo que encuentren en su camino! ¡Por la casa von Valancius!».

languages.text: "Çok doğru." {n}Seberian askerlere dönüyor.{/n} "Zarkov'un askerleri! Ben Seberian von Valancius, sizi beni takip etmeye çağırıyorum! Görevinizi yapın ve yolunuzdaki her düşmanı ezin! Von Valancius Hanesi için!"
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Çok doğru." {n}Seberian askerlere dönüyor.{/n} "Zarkov'un askerleri! Ben Seberian von Valancius, sizi beni takip etmeye çağırıyorum! Görevinizi yapın ve yolunuzdaki her düşmanı ezin! Von Valancius Hanesi için!"

languages.text: “说得好。”{n}塞贝里安转向那些士兵。{/n}“扎尔科夫的士兵们！我，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，号召你们跟随我！尽忠职守，扫清前进路上的所有敌人！为了冯·瓦兰修斯家族！”
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: “说得好。”{n}塞贝里安转向那些士兵。{/n}“扎尔科夫的士兵们！我，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，号召你们跟随我！尽忠职守，扫清前进路上的所有敌人！为了冯·瓦兰修斯家族！”

languages.text: 「いい考えだ。」{n}シベリアは兵士たちに向かう。{/n}「ザルコフの兵士たちよ！私はシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス、君たちを従えよ！君たちの義務を果たし、敵を打ち砕け！ヴァランキウス家のため！」
languages.original_text: "Good point." {n}Seberian turns to the soldiers.{/n} "Soldiers of Zarkov! I, Seberian von Valancius, call on you to follow me! Do your duty and crush every enemy in your path! For House von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: 「いい考えだ。」{n}シベリアは兵士たちに向かう。{/n}「ザルコフの兵士たちよ！私はシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス、君たちを従えよ！君たちの義務を果たし、敵を打ち砕け！ヴァランキウス家のため！」
